UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the application, linked to an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This typically corresponds to the user's ID from the authentication system (e.g., Firebase Auth UID).

username.description: The user's chosen display name, which must be unique.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture, stored in a cloud storage service.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user profile was updated.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: A top-level category for the message board (e.g., 'Survival Hub').

SubCategory.title: SubCategory
SubCategory.description: A specific sub-category within a Category (e.g., 'Base Building').

Topic.title: Topic
Topic.description: Represents a discussion topic or thread on the community message board.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Topic entity.

subCategoryId.description: Reference to the SubCategory this topic belongs to.

title.description: The title of the discussion topic.

content.description: The initial post or main content of the topic.

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this topic.

authorName.description: Cached display name of the author for fast listing.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the topic was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the topic's content was updated, or a reply was added.

lastReplyAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the last reply was made to this topic.

replyCount.description: The total number of replies associated with this topic.

viewCount.description: The number of times this topic has been viewed.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a single message or reply within a community message board topic.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

topicId.description: Reference to the Topic this post belongs to.

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this post.

authorName.description: Cached display name of the author.

content.description: The content of the post or reply.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the post was created.
